cases.prompt: Compliance check: 'Taste the authentic Pakistani flavours at Lazzat — Brampton's best Desi grill!'
cases.expected_behavior: FAIL on checks 1, 2, 4, 15. Rewrite to global framing. Output Compliance Block with Status ❌ REWRITE, then deliver rewritten version with Status ✅ PASS.
assertions: provides a rewritten version using global framing
final block shows PASS after rewrite

cases.prompt: Compliance check: 'Our charcoal-grilled chicken tikka is ready in 60 seconds.'
cases.expected_behavior: FAIL on checks 4, 9, 13. Rewrite with lava stone + no speed claim + menu v14 item name.
assertions: rewritten version uses lava stone + a v14 item (e.g., Chicken Cube)

cases.prompt: Compliance check: 'Lava stone grilled Chicken Cube over saffron rice with Lazzat Green sauce. Halal-sourced. Every culture welcome. McVean Dr, Brampton.'
cases.expected_behavior: PASS all 32 checks. Pillar: Menu Spotlight (or Lava Stone Story). Approver: Lazzat-Brand + Lazzat-Social. Block is delivered clean.

cases.prompt: Compliance check caption: 'Halal-certified meat. JazakAllah to our Brampton family for launch day support!'
cases.expected_behavior: FAIL on checks 5 (religious phrase) and 6 (halal-certified). Rewrite to 'halal-sourced' and 'Thank you, Brampton'.

cases.prompt: Compliance check this ad (date is May 2026): 'Brampton's first lava stone grill — amazing flavours and incredible value.'
cases.expected_behavior: FAIL on launch-window conservatism: 'first', 'amazing', 'incredible' are all superlatives. Rewrite neutralized.
